meta.title: Why the US can't stop the drone swarms flying over its military bases
meta.description:
Download War Thunder for FREE and get your bonus! ► Use my link — https://playwt.link/sandboxx. To download on IOS & Android use — https://wtm.game/sandboxx. Thanks to War Thunder for sponsoring the video!

-- BREAK --

For more than two weeks last December, swarms of drones of varying sizes, flying at varying altitudes in well-orchestrated formations, violated the strictly controlled airspace over Langley Air Force Base in Virginia — sitting directly across the Chesapeake Bay from Naval Station Norfolk — the largest Naval base on the planet. 

This was far from an isolated incident... So why isn't the US military shooting these drones down? Let's figure it out.
